protein_name: Involved in cell-cell adhesion through homophilic interactions. May play a key role in signal transduction and growth control. Belongs to the protein-tyrosine phosphatase family. Receptor class 2B subfamily. 2 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.
